description: Soft voting ensemble (RF + XGB + LR) on top-75 DE genes + 5 pathway scores
rationale: Combining statistical DE features with curated biological pathway scores and a soft-voting ensemble to reduce individual model variance. Pathway scores encode domain knowledge not captured by raw expression.

reviewer_context.hint: Previous approach underperformed. Next strategy should use a fundamentally different feature representation (e.g., PCA, pathway scores, ensemble stacking) rather than incremental changes.
